name: 01-intensive-start
text: Hey, Conscious Creator, welcome to your 72-hour Activation Intensive! You just stepped into the actual workshop where your dream life gets built. Think of it like HGTV, but instead of remodeling a kitchen, we're remodeling your reality. Right here is your Activation Dashboard. You'll see your full 14-step journey laid out like a GPS. You don't have to wonder what to do next. Because wondering is exhausting, and we're not about that life. And as you complete each step, the next one lights up and unlocks, so you literally just follow the path. By the time you reach the finish line, here's what you'll have. A crystal clear, written-life vision across 12 categories. Personalized audio tracks that basically become your future self-hype team. One gorgeous vision board so you can visualize your new reality. A live calibration call with a member of our team. Yes, real humans! And a custom map, or my Activation Plan, so you know exactly how to use all of it to actively become a vibrational match to the life you choose. No confusion, just clarity. And maybe a little happy dance energy. Oh yeah, oh yeah, oh yeah, mm, mm, mm, mm, mm. And here's where it gets extra fun. When you finish your 72-hour activation, you don't just complete a checklist, you graduate. Cap and gown not included, but the upgrades definitely are. Graduate unlocks include the Advanced Audio Suite, deeper tracks to keep your nervous system vibing high. Access to the Alignment Gym, our weekly live coaching space. Think of it like personal training, but for your mind. The Vibe Tribe community, real humans doing this work right alongside you. Plus an amazing suite of additional tools to help you live life above the green line. Honestly, these are some pretty badass graduate unlocks. But they only open after you complete all 14 steps. When you click the Start My Activation Intensive button below, your 72-hour window begins. You'll automatically be directed to your Intensive Dashboard that shows you your next step. The Dashboard is going to be your home throughout the Intensive. If you ever get lost or want to see what's next, just click on Dashboard. Most people finish inside the 72-hour window because focused energy is powerful. But listen, this is motivation, not boot camp. If life happens, kids happen, or even snacks happen. Take the time you need. This isn't about speed, it's about momentum. And the system walks you step by step so you never have to guess what to do next. Only the step you're on is unlocked, so your job is always simple. Just do what's right in front of you. This Activation Intensive has been designed to install a conscious creation system in your reality. By the time this is done, you'll have a powerful system actively propelling you toward the life of your dreams. Right now, you're standing at the starting line. On the other side is your fully built vision, your audios, your board, your map, and a high vibe community ready to celebrate you. So if you're ready to stop thinking about your dream life and actually start building it, click Start My Activation Intensive below. Your timer starts when you click, and your transformation starts the moment you take the first step.

name: 03-profile
text: Welcome to your VibrationFit Profile. This is kind of a big deal. This is the first domino in the whole chain. Profile, Life I Choose, Vision Refinement, Vision Audios, Vision Board, Activation Plan. And when we say Profile, we don't mean something you fill out once and forget about. We mean a version snapshot of who you are right now, this chapter of you. Because you're not static. You're evolving. And this captures you mid-evolution. Anytime something major shifts in your life, you create a new Profile version. Each one becomes a bookmark in your story. It's like looking at a photo of yourself from a year ago. Day to day, you didn't notice much, but then you see the picture and think, oh wow, I've changed. We've made millions in business now, but there was a time when we were six figures in debt, literally asking the universe how to make five grand a month just to pay our bills. And I'm really glad we documented those seasons, because now we don't just feel like we've grown. We can actually see it. That's honestly why VibrationFit exists. Our journey was scattered across legal pads, random journals, Google Docs, Notes apps. It was chaos. We'd spend hours trying to piece together who we were becoming. Your Profile fixes that. One place, one clear snapshot. It shows who you were, who you are, and who you're becoming. In transformation, it's just the gap between versions of you. That's all it is. This captures your starting point. Think of it like dropping a pin on a map. This is me, right here. Across all 12 life categories you're about to see. And this is important. It's not about sounding impressive. It's about being honest, because the more honest you are here, the more powerful everything that follows becomes. Everything that comes next, your life I choose, your refinements, your vision audios, your vision board, your activation plan, is built from what you share right here. As you move through each category, you'll name what's working and what's not. And when you answer, zoom out. Don't base it on one terrible Tuesday or one magical Saturday. Ask yourself, if I look at the last few weeks, what's my average experience in this area? That's what we want. So here's your job. Step 1, click the green Create Your Profile button below. Step 2, move through each life category and add at least one clear statement for what's working and one for what's not. And don't hold back. The more detail you give, the better Viva, our vibrationally intelligent virtual assistant, understands your real starting point. We even built in an audio option. So if writing feels heavy, just talk. It'll transcribe it for you. Keep what you like, delete what you don't. You can do it on a walk, on your lunch break, in the carpool line. Or wherever you find a few quiet minutes. We have three little ones and multiple businesses. Life isn't quiet, it's real. So give yourself permission to do this imperfectly. When you finish and hit Save, this step unlocks your assessment. Woo! Every powerful vision needs a real starting point. This is yours.

name: 05-vision-builder
text: Welcome to the Life Vision Builder. This is the heart of the entire VibrationFit platform. Everything you've done so far has been leading here, and everything you do from now on will have this beating at its core. Your life vision is not a goal list. It's a declaration. It's the blueprint for the life you're choosing to create. Your job here is to unleash your imagination in each category. Describe in vivid detail what your dream life looks like in that area. Hold nothing back. We know it can be daunting to stare at an empty page and try to fill it in with the life of your dreams. That's why we built a Get Me Started button on each category. When you click it, Viva takes information from your profile, specifically what's going well and what's not, and helps get you moving. In VibrationFit, we call that clarity and contrast. Clarity is what you know you want more of. Contrast is what you're done with. And this is important. We don't throw away your contrast. We use it. When you hit Get Me Started, Viva takes the clarity from what's going well and does a contrast flip on what's not going well, turning it into what you actually want instead. She then uses all of that to populate some initial content in the text box using your words, your life, and your details. The more you put into your profile, the more detailed and accurate this starter content will be. This is where most people feel the magic for the first time because suddenly the best parts and the hardest parts of your current life become the raw material for the new life you're building. From there, you can type, edit, or use the audio feature to talk it out. Your job is just to describe your ideal reality in that area like it's already true. Present tense. First person. Use feeling words. What does it actually feel like to live that life? Not, someday I will. More like, this is the life I choose to live now. Behind the scenes, Viva is guiding you through the same creation rhythm we've used for over a decade, so you don't have to think about structure at all. The engine is complex. But the steering wheel is not. Don't worry about getting the verbiage perfect. That's what Viva is for. Capture the truth of the life you're choosing. We can polish later in the refinement step. You'll move through all 12 categories this way, saving as you go. We made this navigable to different categories on purpose. If you feel excited and have clarity on any one area more than any other, click on it first and start there. For example, we love work, money, and the fun things we do with our family. We often begin here and build momentum into the other categories. Essentially, start with what you already have clarity on. Just make sure to save each section as you complete it. When you've finished each category, Viva will assemble them into one unified life vision with a forward and conclusion. That's what we'll refine together in the next step. Similar to your profile, the Life I Choose is an iterative document with the ability to create as many versions as you choose. Your life isn't static, so your life vision shouldn't be either. This is the first version of many Life I Choose documents to come. Your life is going to transform in many ways in the coming years. As life evolves, so does your life vision. So here's your job right now. Click the button, go category by category, and let Viva help you capture your clarity. Take a breath, trust what wants to come through, and click the button to begin. We'll meet you on the other side with your first full draft ready to refine.

name: 14-unlock
text: Welcome to your Unlock page! You've officially completed all 14 steps of your Activation Intensive. That makes you a VibrationFit graduate. Woohoo! This page has two jobs. First, to help you really see how far you've come. And second, to unlock your full platform access. Many of the questions on this page are auto-filled based on what you've completed throughout your Intensive. Feel free to adjust the scores as you see fit. This is the first piece of evidence that you are actively moving in the direction of the life you choose. At the end, we'd love it if you'd capture this moment on video and share how you feel now that you've completed the Activation Intensive. When you've finished, click Unlock Platform to activate your full VibrationFit membership, access your graduate unlocks, and start running your map. You did the work. This is your graduation moment. So complete your snapshot. Congratulate yourself for installing a powerful conscious creation system in your reality. And hit Unlock Platform to step into your next chapter. Welcome to VibrationFit membership! Oh yeah, oh yeah, this is the place where we have fun. Oh yeah, oh yeah, this is the best place ever. Yeah, you rock. You're the best. Oh yeah, thanks for being you and doing all the Intensive for you. That's right. Because you rock, and now your life is so much better. And we'll see you on the inside. Oh yeah. Show them your booty dance skills. I don't think my booty was on camera. It's probably for the best. Bye bye. J and V out.
